response.content:
## Kentucky Online Records

- **Kentucky Deaths, 1911-1967** (FamilySearch) — statewide certificates from 1911 only.
- **Kentucky, Deaths and Burials, 1843-1970** (FamilySearch) — county register index; 1860s-1870s coverage partial.
- **Kentucky Probate Records, 1727-1990** (FamilySearch) — browse-only county court volumes: wills, bonds, settlements.
- **Kentucky, County Marriages, 1797-1954** (FamilySearch).
- **Kentucky Death Records, 1852-1965** (Ancestry) — subscription index including some county-register entries FamilySearch lacks.
- **Kentucky Department for Libraries and Archives (KDLA)** — county court order books and original probate.
